news_posts.title: StarCraft 1.13 released
news_posts.brief_html: Sorry guys for the late post on this, but just to keep everyone informed: sometime last week a patch was released for StarCraft and Brood War. BNETDocs and BNLS have been updated for the changes.

news_posts.title: Diablo 2/LoD 1.11
news_posts.brief_html: Most of the packets have been updated for patch version 1.11. However, I'm still counting on the public to comment in any way, shape or form on the accuracy of the information.

news_posts.title: We're still alive!
news_posts.brief_html: Yes, we're still here for those of you who still wander across the documents. Just last night and this morning I had updated many of our already existing packets with more information/better descriptions/correctness, etc. It sure has been quiet around here, but trust me, BNETDocs still lives :)

news_posts.title: Re: The Lockdown Update
news_posts.brief_html: As most of you will know, Blizzard recently updated their Checkrevision procedure for WarCraft II, StarCraft, Brood War, Diablo I and StarCraft Shareware. This new method, dubbed "Lockdown", is considerably more complex then the previous ix86ver method which is still used by other Battle.net-enabled products.

news_posts.title: BNLS Updates
news_posts.brief_html: BNLS has been upgraded for the latest "lockdown" changes on the Battle.net servers. Bot developers may now use it for requesting fast version checks on all supporting products. At this time, Diablo II, WarCraft III, and their expansions do not make use of the latest updates.

news_posts.title: Starcraft/Brood War Patch 1.15
news_posts.brief_html:
Game: Starcraft, Starcraft: BroodWar
Version: 1.15
VerByte: 0xD1
Archive: SEXP_IX86_114_115.mpq

news_posts.title: BNLS Redirector Service Upgraded
news_posts.brief_html: I have news for those who make use of the redirective domain of bnls.dementedminds.net.

news_posts.title: StarCraft Patched to 1.15.1
news_posts.brief_html: StarCraft was patched to 1.15.1, information on known changes to StarCraft below. No verbyte change. The new offset for the byte to change for No-CDs to work on battle.net is 0x1502F6FB as reported by Andy.

news_posts.title: 0x5E Warden Packet Reactivated
news_posts.brief_html: (08/22/07) Usually, if you connected to battle.net via a bot emulating Starcraft, you'd be disconnected for failure to properly respond to the 0x5E Warden packet.

news_posts.title: CSS Themes
news_posts.brief_html: CSS Themes will be now rendered as external CSS files rather than internal. What this means for you is that if you make use of one of the pre-set themes, such as the Dark Redux theme, and changes are made to it, your CSS Theme will automatically reflect the changes.

news_posts.title: Comment Scripts Complete
news_posts.brief_html: Users now can comment on packets and documents. Editors and administrators also now have ability to delete comments. Enjoy.

news_posts.title: Server Crash
news_posts.brief_html: There was a server crash while I was conducting maintenance, and the backup file got corrupt. Fortunately, I had an older copy of backup. So with the assistance of Leaky, I was able to do a full server wipe and restore.

news_posts.title: Interesting statistics...
news_posts.brief_html: I just checked the stats for the visits to BNETDocs, what I saw was interesting. Here's a list of unique visits per nationality for the month of October:

news_posts.title: Vivendi Games / Activision Merger
news_posts.brief_html: Vivendi Games and Activision have merged into a single company called Activision Blizzard. While the name has Blizzard in it, make no mistake, Vivendi Games is the parent company of Blizzard, and while the name has 'Blizzard' in it, it is Vivendi Games that has merged.

news_posts.title: Happy Holidays!
news_posts.brief_html: Been quite busy with work, apologies! LordVader, Leaky, and I have all been quite busy with work.

news_posts.title: Server Move
news_posts.brief_html: In light of the frequent downtimes we've been experiencing lately, I've procured a new server and will be moving all domains/customers to that new server.

news_posts.title: Server Move Completed
news_posts.brief_html: Server move has been completed. And to save Hdx the effort of having to re-edit the packets/documents, I took the liberty of making another copy from the older server and moved it here.

news_posts.title: Diablo II 1.12a (New Patch)
news_posts.brief_html: Verbyte: 0x0C (12)

news_posts.title: Starcraft Patch 1.16.1
news_posts.brief_html:
Starcraft's version byte is D3 (221).
(Reported by Jailout2000)

news_posts.title: Warcraft III Patch 1.23
news_posts.brief_html:
Verbyte: 0x17 (23)
Hashes: here

news_posts.title: WarCraft III Warden Update
news_posts.brief_html: WarCraft III, as of April 14th, 2009, has an updated warden system. Most bots these days don't know how to handle the warden packet correctly, or don't know how to handle it at all.

news_posts.title: New WarCraft III Patch
news_posts.brief_html: There is a new patch available for WarCraft III Reign of Chaos and WarCraft III The Frozen Throne.

news_posts.title: Just an update as to whats happening with BNLS
news_posts.brief_html: Most of you, if you use BNLS, should know that ValHalla Legends stopped hosting BNLS long ago. And now with JBLS going offline also, we are forced to depend on our own servers, or other peoples servers that we may not trust.

news_posts.title: BNETDocs Continues
news_posts.brief_html: Just wanted to let ya'all know the BNETDocs domain was expiring on Oct 31, so I've gone ahead and renewed the domain. So BNETDocs will continue to exist. Not much news to many of you, but there were some who were inquiring due to lack of updates on the BNETDocs core itself.

news_posts.title: Updates Needed?
news_posts.brief_html: It is evident that BNETDocs Redux is old and requires a little more updated information.

news_posts.title: WarCraft III Update
news_posts.brief_html: There is a new patch available for WarCraft III Reign of Chaos and WarCraft III The Frozen Throne.

news_posts.title: WarCraft III Update
news_posts.brief_html: There is a new patch available for WarCraft III Reign of Chaos and WarCraft III The Frozen Throne.

news_posts.title: Starcraft II Beta Phase 2 Open
news_posts.brief_html: Phase Two of the Starcraft II Beta was launched today.

news_posts.title: StarCraft II Beta is now closed
news_posts.brief_html: The upcoming StarCraft II sequel was running in a closed beta (users had to have a beta key to get on Battle.net) open to selected players by Blizzard to be tested on their new Battle.net v2. Single-player was disabled unless you used the Galaxy Editor or used hacks/mods.

news_posts.title: StarCraft II: Wings of Liberty - Patch 1.0.1
news_posts.brief_html: For those who live under rocks and have not come out recently: StarCraft 2 has been released and has been out for sale since July 27th.

news_posts.title: StarCraft II: Wings of Liberty - Patch 1.0.2
news_posts.brief_html: Bug Fixes:

news_posts.title: Minor updates
news_posts.brief_html: I had taken notice that all (most, anyway) the BNLS packets were still on the Raw-setting, meaning they were new and documentation for them was changing often.

news_posts.title: StarCraft II: Wings of Liberty - Patch 1.0.3
news_posts.brief_html: Bug Fixes:

news_posts.title: Server Checker
news_posts.brief_html: If you have ever been to this website before, you should have noticed the BNLS Server Status panel on the right, along with the Battle.net Server Status panel. These two panels contain servers that you can use with your Battle.net bots.

news_posts.brief_html: Via Battle.net (Blizzard):

news_posts.brief_html: I have found a relatively old thread on darkblizz.org (August 6th, 2010) which seems to have stemmed from this thread on vL by Hdx, which outlined some packets that our documentation was missing.

news_posts.title: BNET.cc - Battle.net Wiki
news_posts.brief_html: The website BNET.cc which used to house forums is now hosting the Battle.net Wiki.

news_posts.title: We're still here...
news_posts.brief_html: Yes, our site has been deemed as inactive by some, but believe us, it is still used quite a bit.

news_posts.title: Server Updater Script Down Indefinitely
news_posts.brief_html: Due to some problems with Jailout2000's machine, the script that updated each server's status on this website has been down for about 3-4 weeks.

news_posts.title: Minor BNETDocs v2 Update
news_posts.brief_html: Decided to put v3 on hold, and give v2 a bit of love. Here's the updates:

news_posts.title: Server Status Re-enabled
news_posts.brief_html: The statuses on the right-hand side of this website are now accurate down to the last 5 minutes.

news_posts.title: Regular news...
news_posts.brief_html: Here's some regular news that some may have been waiting for...

news_posts.title: Starcraft II Starter Edition
news_posts.brief_html: Blizzard has recently (within the last 2 weeks) released a new edition to Starcraft II.

news_posts.title: Diablo III BETA Client Leaked
news_posts.brief_html: As some of you may already know, the Diablo III BETA client has been leaked as of four days ago (2 September 2011). It only recently went hot within the Battle.net dev. communities. (6 September 2011)

news_posts.title: Rest in peace, Steve Jobs
news_posts.brief_html: For the lack of better words, let me simply say this.

news_posts.title: Beta servers are online again?
news_posts.brief_html: Just a few minutes ago of this post, I was logged on to the beta servers with my very own BNRBot, along with some other people: Vector using StealthBot, Arqtekvet using MirageBot, and ColdFear using his unnamed bot. This sums up to a total of four people, not including anyone that may have been online but not in the same channel (/users didn't work and nor did /who).

news_posts.title: Sorry about that...
news_posts.brief_html: As some of you may know, BnetDocs was down from Nov 10, 2011 - Nov 14, 2011.

news_posts.title: Update from Jailout2000
news_posts.brief_html: I no longer run a status update checker for this website. Those server statuses on the right are stale, and will probably not be refreshed by me anytime soon. You can also keep track of servers using toshley.net. That place not only keeps track of Battle.net and BNLS, but also Ventrilo, Minecraft, and other server software. I'd bookmark them if you haven't already.

news_posts.title: BNETDocs Administration Changes
news_posts.brief_html: First off, Jailout2000 is no longer maintaining BNETDocs. What this means is: the status update checker at the right will no longer be refreshed, as those were maintained by him. He will still have editor access, although he won't be posting at BNETDocs as often as he used to.

news_posts.title: Legacy Battle.net Upgrade
news_posts.brief_html: Blizzard has installed new server hardware and they wish to run some benchmark tests on it. They have chosen the Azeroth/USEast realm for this purpose (probably due to its popularity) and will be taking down all servers that host that realm so they can clone the database it uses. When they are finished testing, they plan to roll out the new hardware across all four realms.

news_posts.title: USEast/Azeroth Scheduled Downtime
news_posts.brief_html: The USEast/Azeroth realm will have scheduled maintenance from Blizzard this week.

news_posts.title: Server Upgrade
news_posts.brief_html: The BNETDocs server is now undergoing an upgrade, so there may be temporary downtime.

news_posts.title: USEast/Azeroth Maintenance - Clan Data Rollback
news_posts.brief_html: Blizzard has taken the USEast/Azeroth realm down to do some maintenance to their clan data.

news_posts.title: Battle.net Desktop App
news_posts.brief_html: Blizzard has finally released their Battle.net "Steam" Client; a launcher for all of their games with what looks to eventually support RealID/BattleTag Chat.

news_posts.title: Bnetdocs ownership and a security intrusion from earlier
news_posts.brief_html: Kyro has stepped down as manager and owner of Bnetdocs as he is pursuing other life events and as such, no longer has time for this project. The new manager and owner of Bnetdocs is Jailout2000.

news_posts.title: More updates on the security intrusion
news_posts.brief_html: I have further investigated the security intrusion given the data I have in the database as well as the server access logs.

news_posts.title: Performance updates
news_posts.brief_html: The new site's development has been on hiatus for the last few months. I put small changes in every now and then, but it's definitely not something I'm dedicating time to, since my new job as of March stifles things a bit.

news_posts.title: Work in progress
news_posts.brief_html: I've been giving life back into BNETDocs: Phoenix recently. There's been lots of changes to the code repository and restructuring it. There's been lots of new designs and paradigms put in place that are better than the previous Phoenix from last year. More news coming soon.

news_posts.title: Missing pages added
news_posts.brief_html: The missing pages everywhere on this site have been created with the content of not yet implemented. Building out these pages will take some time, but they will at least no longer show up as 404 Not Found.

news_posts.title: News has been turned on
news_posts.brief_html: I've very nearly completed the news integration with this new BNETDocs code. I've gone ahead and hooked it up to the database as you can now plainly see.

news_posts.title: emNet is back!
news_posts.brief_html: JoYkiLLaH has announced that emNet is officially back and better than before. It's already shaping up with a lot of familiar faces coming online and chatting with everyone.

news_posts.title: Blizzard Nukes Popular HTML5 Version of StarCraft Game
Blizzard Sues Bot Maker For Copyright Infringement
news_posts.brief_html: Blizzard Entertainment is taking a stand against popular cheating bots for World of Warcraft, Diablo 3 and Heroes of the Storm. The game company is suing the alleged operator(s) of a series of popular bots for copyright infringement and accuses them of ruining the gaming experience for legitimate players.

news_posts.title: Diablo II 1.14a Patch
news_posts.brief_html: Blizzard made an announcement on March 12, 2016 that they've finally come back and updated Diablo II after all this time. The new patch is labeled 1.14a and includes new hashes, a new version byte 0x0E, and of course bugfixes for the actual game.

news_posts.title: Why is BNETDocs in read-only mode?
news_posts.brief_html: Hey all, I figured it might be time to remind everyone why BNETDocs is in read-only mode, and how to continue serving the community you love.

news_posts.title: Warcraft III 1.27a Patch
news_posts.brief_html: Blizzard made an announcement on March 14, 2016 that they've not only updated Diablo II but now they've also updated Warcraft III! The new patch is labeled 1.27a and includes new hashes, a new version byte 0x1B, and some bugfixes just as there were to Diablo II.

news_posts.title: U.S. West down for maintenance
news_posts.brief_html: [Update 03/15/2016] U.S. West is back online and their forum post has been deleted.

news_posts.title: Warcraft III 1.27a MSVCR120.dll Error
news_posts.brief_html: When Blizzard released Warcraft III patch 1.27a earlier this month, it turns out that they had forgotten to include the Microsoft Visual C++ Redistributable package when patching from earlier versions. This is the cause of why some may be receiving the error about MSVCR120.dll when launching the game.

news_posts.title: BNETDocs Phoenix is now live!
news_posts.brief_html: With all of the updates that have been happening to BNETDocs Phoenix lately, I felt it was ready to be promoted to the main site! Don't worry, Redux is still accessible.

news_posts.title: Diablo II 1.14b Maintenance Release
news_posts.brief_html: On Thursday, April 7, 2016, Blizzard announced a patch to Diablo II. The new version upgrades Diablo II from 1.14a to 1.14b. There are no known version byte or hash file updates so far, but we will revise this news post if there is.

news_posts.title: Blizzard will be updating Starcraft too!
news_posts.brief_html: On April 13, 2016, Blizzard announced that in addition to the updates they have made to Diablo II and Warcraft III, they will also be updating Starcraft!

news_posts.title: Diablo II 1.14c Patch and Ladder Reset Announcement
news_posts.brief_html: Hey all,

news_posts.title: Diablo II 1.14d Patch
news_posts.brief_html: On Tuesday, June 7, 2016, Blizzard patched Diablo II up to version 1.14d.

news_posts.title: BNETDocs General Status Update
news_posts.brief_html: Figured it was time for a general status update of BNETDocs.

news_posts.title: Blizzard Sues Overwatch “Cheat” Maker For Copyright Infringement
news_posts.brief_html: Blizzard Entertainment is suing Bossland, the maker of the popular Overwatch cheat tool "Watchover Tyrant" and several other game cheats. Among other things, the developer accuses the German company of various forms of copyright infringement and unfair competition.

news_posts.title: StarCraft Patch 1.17.0 Pre-Release
news_posts.brief_html: Blizzard has uploaded a copy of their new patch for StarCraft and StarCraft: Brood War version 1.17.0. It is currently not active on Battle.net servers (connecting using 1.17.0 displays an unsupported version error message), however it can be downloaded from their FTP site. It contains the new version byte 0xD5, a bump from 0xD3 as seen on 1.16.1. The patch was first reported at tieba.baidu.com on July 22 and at teamliquid.net on July 25.

news_posts.title: Maelstrom CD-Key Tester 4.0
news_posts.brief_html: After last being updated November 1, 2012, I have finally released another update for Maelstrom CD-Key Tester on August 2, 2016. After being in development for roughly the last 2 months it has been improved in a number of ways. From a few new major additions to improvements in speed and performance.

news_posts.title: BNETDocs General Status Update for August
news_posts.brief_html: BNETDocs has been going through quite a few changes lately. I figured it was time for another status update. This is a follow-up news post to the previous status update.

news_posts.title: Simplicity 1.0
news_posts.brief_html: It has been almost 4 years since the last update, but I am pleased to once again provide an update to this program. There are a lot of minor details with this update, but the biggest change is using custom named initiates in a newly created clan instead of just using the generated initiate names. The biggest issue that was addressed was the creation of clans in general. The last public version (version 0.72) did not handle clan creation very well.

news_posts.title: StarCraft: Brood War Remaster Rumors Recap
news_posts.brief_html: In early August, iNews24, citing an inside source, reported a StarCraft: Brood War remaster in the works that would include high resolution graphics and an improved user interface, and would be initially announced in September with another announcement coming in during this year's BlizzCon, which occurred from November 4 – November 5.

news_posts.title: What's Next for WarCraft 3
news_posts.brief_html: With the release of the 1.27b patch on December 13, Blizzard has been more vocal about their intentions for the next WarCraft 3 patch, 1.27c.

news_posts.title: US West Scheduled Maintenance
news_posts.brief_html: Blizzard will be performing maintenance on US West on January 17, 2017 from 10:00 AM - 1:00 PM PT (UTC-8).

news_posts.title: USEast Scheduled Maintenance
news_posts.brief_html: Blizzard will be performing maintenance to the USEast Classic Battle.net servers on Tuesday, February 7, 2017 from 10:00AM to 3:00PM PST.

news_posts.title: Europe Scheduled Maintenance
news_posts.brief_html: Blizzard will be performing maintenance to the Europe Classic Battle.net servers on Tuesday, February 7, 2017 from 4:00PM to 9:00PM PST.

news_posts.title: Asia Scheduled Maintenance
news_posts.brief_html: Blizzard will be performing maintenance to the Europe Classic Battle.net servers on Tuesday, February 9, 2017 from 2:30PM to 5:00PM PST.

news_posts.title: Classic Battle.net Illy account update
news_posts.brief_html: As of this posting, Blizzard has re-enabled the creation of illy accounts on all 4 realms of Classic Battle.net, with exception to the @ symbol.

news_posts.title: Battle.net Scheduled Maintenance
news_posts.brief_html: Blizzard will be performing maintenance to all Classic Battle.net regions on Tuesday, February 14, 2017.

news_posts.title: BNETDocs and Cloudflare's Memory Leak (#Cloudbleed)
news_posts.brief_html: Between September 22, 2016 and February 21, 2017, Cloudflare leaked memory due to a parser bug in three of their features: Automatic HTTP Rewrites, Server-Side Excludes, and Email Obfuscation. A Google security researcher discovered the bug on February 17 and began cooperating with Cloudflare to mitigate and patch the bug.

news_posts.title: USWest Scheduled Maintenance
news_posts.brief_html: Blizzard will be performing maintenance to the USWest Classic Battle.net servers on Friday, March 3, 2017 from 8:00AM to 12:00PM PST.

news_posts.title: I've disabled Cloudflare and started using Let's Encrypt
news_posts.brief_html: BNETDocs is no longer using Cloudflare for any purpose other than DNS right now, and SSL/TLS has been switched from expired Comodo certificates to Let's Encrypt with automatic renewal.

news_posts.title: SC: Remastered confirmed and StarCraft patch 1.18a
news_posts.brief_html: A previous BNETDocs article talked about a rumor that StarCraft would be getting remastered. This suspicion was confirmed after Blizzard announced their plans during the "I <3 StarCraft" event which celebrated 19 years of StarCraft:

news_posts.title: Battle.net Scheduled Maintenance for StarCraft Patch 1.18
news_posts.brief_html: Blizzard will be performing maintenance to the Classic Battle.net servers on Tuesday, March 28, 2017 in preparation for StarCraft: Brood War Remastered (Patch 1.18).

news_posts.title: StarCraft: Brood War Patch 1.18 Patch Notes
news_posts.brief_html: StarCraft 1.18 has been officially released today by Blizzard, the first patch in over 8 years. With this patch, StarCraft and StarCraft: Brood War are now free to play. A copy of the patch notes has been provided below.

news_posts.title: Server Moved
news_posts.brief_html: I performed some infrastructure changes to BNETDocs over the weekend.

news_posts.title: Discord Server!
news_posts.brief_html: We've setup an official BNETDocs Discord server!

news_posts.title: Warcraft 3 United Discord Affiliation
news_posts.brief_html: Hey guys, check out this Discord community called Warcraft 3 United:

news_posts.title: Warcraft III Remastered Announcement Rumored
news_posts.brief_html: Blizzard will be making a remastered copy of Warcraft III.

news_posts.title: Warcraft III Invitational
news_posts.brief_html: Earlier we speculated a Warcraft III Remastered announcement was coming that included an invitational rumor, and today a Blizzard announcement has been made for that Warcraft III invitational.

news_posts.title: Battle.net Server Upgrade/Maintenance
news_posts.brief_html: The Blizzard team behind the recent Starcraft Remastered project and other patches to Blizzard's Classic Games have announced a server upgrade/patch scheduled for today.

news_posts.title: Warcraft III Patch 1.30.0.9900
news_posts.brief_html: A patch has been published by Blizzard today for the Warcraft III game and its expansion pack The Frozen Throne.

news_posts.title: Warcraft III Patch 1.30.0.9922
news_posts.brief_html: Blizzard has released a hotfix patch for Warcraft III and its expansion pack.

news_posts.title: Battle.net Server Upgrade - 14 August 2018
news_posts.brief_html: Blizzard has patched Classic Battle.net again.

news_posts.title: Password Resets
news_posts.brief_html: It's been a long time since BNETDocs had its site makeover, a few years in fact, and during that length of time, it was impossible for a user to recover their account completely on their own. Today, users may now reset their password on this site on their own, without the aid of a staff member.

news_posts.title: Packet status
news_posts.brief_html: When the new site was launched a few years ago, it didn't include the status on packets indicating whether it was defunct/deprecated or in research, like the older revision of the site did. Today, that has been fixed, and packets now show their statuses again. Enjoy!

news_posts.title: Diablo II Ladder Reset - December 4th
news_posts.brief_html: As every half year we expect a ladder reset for Diablo II. This year its earlier as expected, but later announced as we are used to.

news_posts.title: Diablo 2. Last reset before D2R
news_posts.brief_html: It is finally announced. The last ladder reset before Diablo II Resurrected. You join us in the last season?

news_posts.title: Site Redesign and New Features
news_posts.brief_html: Greetings, BNETDocs members! We have published a new site redesign, which includes many improvements over the old design. The old design was not as giving to modern web design, it was rigid and unforgiving. This design is a polished, sleek user interface enabled by the bootstrap framework, enabling responsive web design out of the box.

news_posts.brief_html:
